title: Full Time Junior Crew
description:
Kiztopia is a successful start-up and the biggest indoor children playground in Singapore! We are seeking a motivated and cheerful Junior Crew to join our team at our indoor playground. As a Junior Crew, you will play a vital role in ensuring a safe, enjoyable, and memorable experience for children and their families. You will assist the day-to-day operations of the playground and maintain a clean and organized environment. This position requires a passion for working with children, and the ability to handle various tasks simultaneously.

Highlights of what we offer:

  • Dynamic, fun and rewarding working environment
  • Close knitted team
  • Good employee benefits (eg. incentives, medical insurance, on job training, uniform etc.)
  • Career growth and development opportunities

We offer the following benefits to Full-Time employees:

  • A five-day (shift schedule) work week comprising not more than 44 hours.
  • Staff discounts applicable at all outlets.
  • Monthly sales incentive awards*
  • Monthly attendance incentive*
  • Staff referral fee
  • Annual variable performance bonus
  • Progressive annual leave entitlement
  • Uniform provided
  • On-the-job training
  • Comprehensive medical benefits to ensure the health and well-being of our employees.
  • Opportunities for career development, fostering growth and advancement within the group.
  • The opportunity to grow with the company, contributing to its success and sharing in its achievements.

Roles & Responsibilities:

  1. Assist in handling and managing customer visit experience
  2. Assist in crowd control and managing visitor safety
  3. Assist in maintaining playground cleanliness & its tidiness
  4. Assist in managing the playground inventory and storage
  5. Assist in operating & upkeeping playground equipment
  6. Support day to day admission check in/out process
  7. Support day to day event activities and performance
  8. Complete any other tasks assigned by the supervisor

Job Requirements:

  1. Able to work with young children and their families.
  2. Flexibility to work shifts, weekends, and public/school holidays.
  3. Capability to stand/walk for extended periods
  4. A positive attitude and a strong commitment to ensuring customer satisfaction and ability to create a welcoming and friendly atmosphere infused with high energy and enthusiasm.
  5. Past experience in customer-facing roles is a plus.
  6. This is a FULL TIME position.
  7. The work location will be assigned based on business requirements which will be shared with you during interview. Please refer to our website for outlets location (https://kiztopia.com).

Qualifications Requirements:

  1. At least GCE ‘N’ Level Certificate

* We thank all applicants for your interest but regret to inform that only shortlisted candidates will be notified.

postedCompany.description: Kiztopia is Singapore's mega-indoor kids' edutainment playgrond centre for families to enjoy endless fun and have a unique "Play, Learn, Eat and Bond" experience. Warm, inviting and family-oriented environments with specially designed play areas to support holistic development of children.
postedCompany.name: KIZTOPIA SERVICES PTE. LTD.
